mapper.insert: insert into ygt_member_join_source (ygt_mjs_customer_user_id, ygt_mjs_open_id, ygt_mjs_union_id, ygt_mjs_wecom_external_user_id, ygt_mjs_wecom_user_id, ygt_mjs_phone_snapshot, ygt_mjs_nickname_snapshot, ygt_mjs_source_campaign_id, ygt_mjs_source_wecom_group_id, ygt_mjs_source_share_code, ygt_mjs_inviter_customer_user_id, ygt_mjs_bind_status, ygt_mjs_bind_source, ygt_mjs_match_method, ygt_mjs_create_time, ygt_mjs_update_time) values (#{ygtMjsCustomerUserId}, #{ygtMjsOpenId}, #{ygtMjsUnionId}, #{ygtMjsWecomExternalUserId}, #{ygtMjsWecomUserId}, #{ygtMjsPhoneSnapshot}, #{ygtMjsNicknameSnapshot}, #{ygtMjsSourceCampaignId}, #{ygtMjsSourceWecomGroupId}, #{ygtMjsSourceShareCode}, #{ygtMjsInviterCustomerUserId}, #{ygtMjsBindStatus}, #{ygtMjsBindSource}, #{ygtMjsMatchMethod}, #{ygtMjsCreateTime}, #{ygtMjsUpdateTime})
mapper.delete: delete from ygt_member_join_source where ygt_member_join_source_id in #{id}
